issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' not 'Activated'. This is a static/passive ability that grants a permanent keyword, not an activated ability.
Condition 'HasRestingDon' is incorrect. The effect requires DON!! x1 attached to this character (HasAttachedDon:1), not resting DON!!.
Duration should be 'Permanent' not 'EndOfTurn'. The ability to attack active characters is a continuous keyword ability, not a temporary effect.
'Unblockable' is not the correct keyword. The ability to attack active characters is typically 'CanAttackActive' or similar direct pierce mechanic, not unblockable.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] This Character can also attack your opponent's active Characters.
